title: Wow! Another Herobrine Mod!
description: A parody mod featuring a Herobrine Counter, a Herobrine Biome with a face block portal, and a dimension filled with Herobrine-themed blocks and fluid. Track your Herobrine encounters with fun advancements!
body:
# Wow! Another Herobrine Mod!

**Wow! Another Herobrine Mod!** is a fun and lighthearted parody mod that adds a variety of Herobrine-themed features to Minecraft. The mod includes a **Herobrine Counter** that tracks how many Herobrines you've encountered, with fun advancements for milestones such as 1, 10, 100, 500, 1000, and a hidden 10000 click.

Explore the **Herobrine Biome**, where you’ll find a unique block with Herobrine's face. Mine this block to activate a portal to the **Herobrine Dimension**, where you can discover more Herobrine face blocks and even Herobrine face fluid.

This mod is perfect for those who enjoy a humorous take on the Herobrine myth, with a mix of exploration, tracking, and parody elements!
